config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because that is exactly how governments and majorities can abuse people. In my view, society is strongest when it protects personal freedom, dignity, and fair treatment even when that is inconvenient. From my perspective, the collective good should guide policy, but not at the cost of crushing the individual.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diutamakan di atas hak individu, karena bagi saya itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu bukan sekadar hambatan bagi kepentingan umum; justru hak itulah yang melindungi minoritas dari tirani mayoritas dan membuat masyarakat tetap adil. Tentu ada keadaan darurat, seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan, di mana pembatasan tertentu bisa dibenarkan, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, sementara, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” hanya menjadi alasan kabur untuk mengorbankan kebebasan dasar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should automatically outrank the rights of the individual. In Indonesia, we are taught the importance of gotong royong and social harmony, but I have also seen how easily “for the public good” can be used to silence criticism or ignore minority voices. Society does need limits on individual freedom in some cases, but those limits must be narrow, fair, and clearly justified, or they become a tool for abuse. A healthy society protects the individual first, because people cannot truly contribute to the common good if their basic rights are not secure.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah diberi terlalu banyak ruang atas nama “kepentingan umum,” hasilnya sering justru penindasan terhadap minoritas dan pembatasan kebebasan dasar. Saya setuju bahwa ada keadaan darurat yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan tertentu, tetapi itu harus sangat terbatas, jelas dasarnya, dan mudah diuji, bukan dijadikan alasan kabur. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi hak orang bahkan saat itu tidak nyaman bagi mayoritas.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should take priority over the rights of the individual as a general rule. From my Indonesian perspective, values like gotong royong and social harmony are important, but they should not be used to justify silencing dissent, crushing minorities, or giving the state too much power. I also reject the idea that “the public good” is automatically more moral, because in practice it can become a vague excuse for abuse unless it is tightly limited and accountable. A good society protects individual rights first, because people can only genuinely contribute to the common good when their dignity and freedom are secure.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai aturan umum, karena di Amerika kami sangat peka terhadap bagaimana “kepentingan masyarakat” bisa dipakai untuk menekan kebebasan dan minoritas. Memang ada situasi darurat seperti wabah atau ancaman keselamatan yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, sementara, dan bisa diuji secara ketat. Saya juga tidak setuju dengan anggapan bahwa hak individu menghalangi kebaikan bersama; justru hak itulah yang membuat masyarakat tetap adil dan mencegah mayoritas bertindak semaunya. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin melindungi martabat dan kebebasan setiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
